Research Model

Model Logic

01

Input Variables

R&D intensity, firm size, profitability, and sector classification.

→
02

OLS Regression

Tested whether R&D investment predicts annual stock returns.

→
03

Result

R² ≈ 0.01 with no statistically significant R&D premium.

→
04

Interpretation

Findings point toward market efficiency and omitted-variable limits.

Selected Work

Computer Science & Finance Projects.

TeamBlueLock

Full-stack financial operations platform built with Next.js and MongoDB. Features inventory management, ingredient costing, profit-margin analysis, and automated reporting dashboards.

Next.js • MongoDB • Playwright • Jest

AI Stock Prediction Research

Developed machine-learning models using financial indicators and market data to predict short-term stock movements while evaluating model performance against real market outcomes.

Python • Finance • ML

Personal Finance Tracker

Budgeting and financial management application featuring transaction tracking, spending analytics, and budget variance monitoring.

Finance • Analytics • Web Development

Roommate Matching Platform

Multi-school roommate discovery platform with messaging functionality, profile matching, and housing collaboration tools.

React • Full Stack • Product Design

Currency Converter

Python application integrating live foreign exchange data APIs for currency valuation, conversion, and market-rate monitoring.

Python • APIs • FX Markets

Financial Data Research Toolkit

Statistical analysis workflow using regression models, robust standard errors, multicollinearity testing, and financial datasets.

R • Econometrics • Quantitative Finance
